NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF APR-28-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE CASE FILE. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HER NAME TO JENNIFER EVELYN NASSER. DECREE CHANGING NAME IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER GIANELLI, JENNIFER ELIZABETH
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (SAN FRANCISCO DAILY JOURNAL) OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
